steps.what_happened: The Web Manager sub-navigation menu appears.
steps.why_this_action: To access the tools for managing how the property is displayed on the web.
steps.preconditions: Property record BCN30555 is open in Salesforce.
steps.visual_feedback: The tab is highlighted, and new sub-tabs (Overview, Images, Publications, etc.) appear below.

steps.what_happened: The image management interface loads, showing 'Published images'.
steps.why_this_action: To manage the photos associated with the property listing.
steps.visual_feedback: The Images sub-tab is underlined, and a grid of published photos is displayed.

steps.what_happened: The page scrolls down to reveal the 'Remaining images' section.
steps.why_this_action: To find images that have been uploaded to Synology but not yet published to Salesforce.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Remaining images' section becomes visible at the bottom of the page.

target_element.description: Selection checkbox on a remaining image

steps.what_happened: The image is selected for publication.
steps.why_this_action: To choose which specific images to move from the pending state to the published state.
steps.preconditions: Images are visible in the 'Remaining images' section.
steps.visual_feedback: A blue checkmark or highlight appears on the selected image.

steps.what_happened: A confirmation modal titled 'Publish these images' appears.
steps.why_this_action: To initiate the process of publishing the selected images.
steps.preconditions: At least one image in 'Remaining images' is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: A modal dialog box opens in the center of the screen.

steps.what_happened: The system processes the publication and shows a success message.
steps.why_this_action: To confirm and finalize the publication of the selected images.
steps.visual_feedback: A green success message 'Completed successfully' appears in the modal.

steps.what_happened: The modal closes and the view returns to the published images grid.
steps.why_this_action: To dismiss the success message and return to the main interface.
steps.visual_feedback: The modal disappears, and the newly published image is now visible in the 'Published images' section.

target_element.description: Tag icon on a published image

steps.what_happened: A 'Select the image label' modal appears.
steps.why_this_action: To assign a descriptive label (e.g., room type) to the image for SEO and portal categorization.
steps.visual_feedback: A modal with a list of room labels (Balcony, Kitchen, Living room, etc.) opens.

steps.why_this_action: To identify the room shown in the photo.
steps.visual_feedback: The radio button or text for 'Kitchen' is highlighted/selected.

steps.what_happened: The label is saved and the modal closes.
steps.why_this_action: To apply the selected label to the image.
steps.visual_feedback: The modal closes, and the image card now displays the 'Kitchen' label instead of 'No label'.

workflow_summary: This workflow describes how to manage property images within the Lucas Fox Salesforce environment. It covers navigating to the Web Manager, publishing pending images from the 'Remaining images' section, and tagging published images with specific room labels (like 'Kitchen') to optimize listing presentation and SEO on real estate portals.

decision_points.description: The user can select images individually or use 'Select all' to publish multiple images at once.
The user must choose the most appropriate label from a predefined list that matches the content of the photo.

potential_variations: The user might also reorder images by dragging and dropping them within the 'Published images' section to ensure the best photos appear first. The number of images published can vary, though the video recommends between 20 and 40.
error_handling_observed: None observed; the workflow proceeded through successful confirmation states.
